mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TF_CALENDAR_EVENT( ID, USER_ID, PROJECT_ID, TASK_ID, NAME, START_DATE, END_DATE, TYPE, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_AT ) VALUES( SEQ_TF_CALENDAR_EVENT_PK.nextval, #{userId}, #{projectId}, #{taskId}, #{name}, #{startDate}, #{endDate}, #{type}, SYSDATE, SYSDATE )
mapper.update: UPDATE TF_CALENDAR_EVENT SET USER_ID = #{userId}, PROJECT_ID = #{projectId}, TASK_ID = #{taskId}, NAME = #{name}, START_DATE = #{startDate}, END_DATE = #{endDate}, TYPE = #{type}, CREATED_AT = #{createdAt}, UPDATED_AT = #{updatedAt} WHERE ID = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM TF_CALENDAR_EVENT WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND START_DATE >= TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'IW') AND END_DATE <= TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'IW') + 6 ORDER BY START_DATE
mapper.update:
MERGE INTO tf_calendar_event t USING DUAL ON (t.e_id = #{eId})
WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET t.name = #{name}, t.start_date = #{startDate}, t.end_date = #{endDate}, t.e_tag = #{eTag}, t.updated_at = SYSDATE WHERE (t.e_tag IS NULL OR t.e_tag != #{eTag}) WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( ID, USER_ID, PROJECT_ID, TASK_ID, NAME, START_DATE, END_DATE, TYPE, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_AT, E_ID, E_TAG ) VALUES( SEQ_TF_CALENDAR_EVENT_PK.nextval, #{userId}, #{projectId}, #{taskId}, #{name}, #{startDate}, #{endDate}, #{type}, SYSDATE, SYSDATE, #{eId}, #{eTag} )
